title: Figma learning lab: build your first Weave workflow
speakers: Moran Dankner (Creative workflow advocate, Figma), Ken Vreman (Senior Design Advocate, Figma)
key_points: A hands-on, bring-your-laptop workshop that takes attendees from a blank canvas to a working Figma Weave workflow, demystifying node-based tools by actually building with them.
Walks through the core mechanics of Weave: connecting models, directing outputs, and controlling each step of the workflow.
Frames Figma Weave as giving users explicit, granular control over every step of a node-based AI workflow.
Includes informal follow-up time with the Figma team afterward in the Learning Lab Lounge.
